name: Christopher Kastner
background: Christopher D. Kastner is president and chief executive officer of HII. He was elected to this position and to the board of directors in March 2022. Kastner previously served as HII’s chief operating officer, executive vice president and chief financial officer, and corporate vice president and general manager of corporate development and strategy. He also served as vice president, business management, and chief financial officer for HII’s Ingalls Shipbuilding division.

commpanies.name: Huntington Ingalls Industries, Inc.
commpanies.title_or_role: Director, President and Chief Executive Officer
